En Passant is controlled at compile time through CFG_EN_PASSANT.
Legal Move Generation is controlled at compile time through CFG_LEGAL_MOVE_GENERATION.
Magic Bitboards is controlled at compile time through CFG_MAGIC_BITBOARDS.
Move Generation is controlled at compile time through CFG_MOVE_GENERATION.
Move Ordering is controlled at compile time through CFG_MOVE_ORDERING.
Pseudo-Legal Move Generation is controlled at compile time through CFG_PSEUDO_LEGAL_MOVE_GENERATION.

UCI is controlled at compile time through CFG_UCI.
Delta Pruning is controlled at compile time through CFG_DELTA_PRUNING.
Futility Pruning is controlled at compile time through CFG_FUTILITY_PRUNING.

Null Move Pruning is controlled at compile time through CFG_NULL_MOVE_PRUNING.
Razoring is controlled at compile time through CFG_RAZORING.
Alpha-Beta is controlled at compile time through CFG_ALPHA_BETA.
Aspiration Windows is controlled at compile time through CFG_ASPIRATION_WINDOWS.
Fifty-Move Rule is controlled at compile time through CFG_FIFTY_MOVE_RULE.

Threefold Repetition is controlled at compile time through CFG_THREEFOLD_REPETITION.
Pondering is controlled at compile time through CFG_PONDERING.
Pondering is controlled at runtime through --pondering.
Time Management is controlled at compile time through CFG_TIME_MANAGEMENT.
Time Management is controlled at runtime through --time-management.
Hash Move is controlled at compile time through CFG_HASH_MOVE.
Pawn Hash Table is controlled at compile time through CFG_PAWN_HASH_TABLE.
Replacement Schemes is controlled at compile time through CFG_REPLACEMENT_SCHEMES.
Transposition Table is controlled at compile time through CFG_TRANSPOSITION_TABLE.
Zobrist Hashing is controlled at compile time through CFG_ZOBRIST_HASHING.

constraints.rationale: Magic indexing is defined over bitboard representation.
Legal move generation extends the base move generation pipeline.
Pseudo-legal generation still depends on core move generation support.
Copy-make still needs deterministic move application.
Unmake is the inverse operation of make-move.
Castling legality depends on attack-aware legal move generation.
En-passant legality depends on legal move validation.
Tree search requires move application.
Alpha-Beta implementation uses make/unmake in recursion.
Tournament-legal alpha-beta variants include castling rules.
Tournament-legal alpha-beta variants include en-passant rules.
Tournament-legal alpha-beta variants detect repetition draws.
Tournament-legal alpha-beta variants detect 50-move draws.
Tree search requires move application.
Negamax implementation uses make/unmake in recursion.
Quiescence examines tactical continuations via move application.
Quiescence implementation reverts explored captures.
Hash move retrieval requires a transposition table.
Pawn-hash keys are derived from hashing strategy.
PVS is an Alpha-Beta refinement.
Aspiration windows wrap around Alpha-Beta search bounds.
Null-move pruning is integrated in alpha-beta style search.
LMR depends on alpha-beta move ordering and bounds.
Futility pruning relies on alpha-beta bound context.
Delta pruning is applied in quiescence search.
Board encodings are modeled as alternative primary representations.
Board encodings are modeled as alternative primary representations.
Board encodings are modeled as alternative primary representations.
Board encodings are modeled as alternative primary representations.
Board encodings are modeled as alternative primary representations.
Board encodings are modeled as alternative primary representations.
